result:
**Repair committed and pushed: `553a6a6`** (f709d43..553a6a6, clean). Report per your required format:

**Commit:** `553a6a6` — scoped P4 standard-lateral hardening, 9 owned files only (p4_lib.py + hardened validator/unfold-driver/merged-audit/replacement + tests + RUN_LOG receipt). No FPS validator, no STATUS, no `RUNS.tsv` staged. No covariance built/promoted/adopted.

**Tests:** `nd-unfolding/tests/test_p4_repair.py` — **16/16 PASS** covering all eight verifier-identified failure modes (missing endpoint, truncated output, missing census/migration, zero/absent component, order/hash mismatch, missing support block, component-sum mismatch, invalid projection) + MAT two-endpoint formula preserved + happy paths. `py_compile`/`bash -n` clean on all repair artifacts.

**Live 10/10 state:** all 10 standard endpoint unfolds **content-validated** (open, non-zombie, not-recovered, finite `hXSecND_flat`, common dim 65856, positive; sums 7.64–7.97e-36) — **0 missing/invalid**. Merged inputs 10/10 intact. Holder `56082262`/nid004145 still up (driver idle, 0 procs). Nothing consumed or mutated.

**Residual evidence blocker:** MIG-V2 = BLOCK stands — **candidate covariance construction remains gated on the standard-p4-verifier (`019f74cb-…`) returning PASS on this patch** (`553a6a6`); I did not construct it. Secondary: the STATUS one-liner is deferred (ND_OMNIFOLD_STATUS.md carries a concurrent session's uncommitted edit — not folded); and git HEAD had been reset to `f709d43` (earlier commits rewound), so the repair is committed onto the current HEAD.

**Untouched:** Agent C's holder `56080370`/nid004149/FPS namespace and `p4_validate_active_lateral_fps.py`, the C++ binary, `uq_4d/corrected/`, PET products, and `RUNS.tsv`.

Hardened chain is ready for verifier review; on PASS, candidate construction runs merge(done)→unfold(done, 10/10 valid)→`analyze_universes_5d`→fail-closed `p4_validate_active_lateral.py`→CANDIDATE (no final adoption).
